room.caption: [G2-TownA] If not in fullscreen mode, press F3 to double the window size. Some messages up here can't be read with the 1x window size.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10) global.zEncZone=1
if global.gameProgress=650 global.gameProgress=660
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(206) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode:
talker="Old Woman" stringToShow="If you hit an enemy with a melee attack in the air, you will cancel downward velocity and bounce." boxSize=2
AI_Action=1 runAcc=-0.25 image_speed=0.1

talker="Grizzlied Man" stringToShow="Mastering bombs will assist you greatly... is that a spoiler?" boxSize=2
AI_Action=1 runAcc=-1.5 image_speed=0.3 sprite_index=sNPC_ZMan

talker="Dressed Woman" stringToShow="There are secrets everywhere." boxSize=1
AI_Action=2 runAcc=-0.75 image_speed=0.15 sprite_index=sNPC_ZWoman

talker="Fast Running Man" stringToShow="I RUN SO FAST!!" boxSize=0
AI_Action=1 runAcc=-6 image_speed=0.6 sprite_index=sNPC_ZCreep

talker="Proper Lady" stringToShow="Awesome Points don't do anything. They're just an arbitrary point value." boxSize=2
AI_Action=1 runAcc=1 image_speed=0.3 sprite_index=sNPC_ZMidAgeWoman
